message: Error IDs are stable public API and must not change once released
Messages are templates rendered from params and should not be used for program control
Collect all validation failures for a field when practical instead of failing at the first validator
Admin schema parsing and registration failures use kind schema
Runtime argv parsing and value validation failures use kind validation
Use path for command path flag name tuple index or list index context
Unknown schema operator
Unknown schema flag for the selected operator
Schema flag requires a following value
Schema flag value is malformed
Schema flags cannot be used together
Validation operator is already registered
Enum value has leading or trailing whitespace
Enum value is empty after trimming
Required value is missing
User argv contains an unknown flag
User argv value cannot be parsed as the expected type
Value failed string validation
Value failed number validation
Tuple value failed validation
List value failed validation
Value failed format validation
Value is outside the allowed range
